title.notes: All 5 products have accurate titles. P1: 'Eve's Petite Private Pleasure Wand - by Adam & Eve', P2: 'Eve's Rechargeable Thrusting Rabbit - by Adam & Eve', P3: 'Adam & Eve Lubricant', P4: 'Adam & Eve Sunrise Dreams Realistic Dildo', P5: 'Adam & Eve The Rumbler 10X Power Bullet'. All match expected h1 content.

price.notes: All sale/promo prices correctly extracted: P1=$27.50 (from jcpoffer-pricerange), P2=$67.50, P3=$7.50, P4=$11.97 (from og:price:amount), P5=$12.00. All are text strings with $ prefix.

availability.notes: All 5 products show 'In Stock' matching og:availability='instock'.

original_price.notes: PREVIOUSLY HIGH-SEVERITY ISSUE — NOW FIXED. P1=$54.99, P2=$134.99, P3=$14.99, P4=$39.99 (was '$39.99-$49.99Save Up to $35.02 (71%)'), P5=$59.99 (was '$59.99Excluded from promotion.Save $47.99 (80%)'). All values are clean dollar amounts without marketing garbage.

url.notes: All URLs are full product page URLs matching og:url.

src_url.notes: src_url correctly set to input URL for all products.

status_code.notes: All 5 products have status_code=200. PREVIOUSLY P3 had status_code=0 due to crash — now correctly reports 200.

scraped_at.notes: Valid ISO-8601 timestamps on all products.

remarks.notes: Empty for all 5 products (no issues encountered).

images.notes: PREVIOUSLY MEDIUM-SEVERITY ISSUE — NOW FIXED. Images are deduplicated. P1=10 images (was 20), P2=11 (was 22), P3=3, P4=4, P5=6 (was 12). All URLs contain adameve.com/cms and no 1x1/0x0 tracking pixels. All URLs are absolute with https:// scheme. Counts are in reasonable range (3-11).

brand.notes: All 5 show 'Adam and Eve' from og:brand.

sku.notes: PREVIOUSLY LOW-SEVERITY ISSUE — NOW FIXED. P1=E194, P2=C706, P3=115H, P4=J931, P5=J928. All match expected SKU codes from product_analysis.json.

P1=['Home','Sex Toys','Vibrators','Clitoral Vibrators'], P2=['Home','Sex Toys','Vibrators','Rabbit Vibrators'], P3=['Home','Lubes and Sexual Wellness','Lubricants','Water Based Lubes'], P4=['Home','Sex Toys','Dildos','Realistic Dildos'], P5=['Home','Sex Toys','Vibrators','Bullets and Eggs'].

rating.notes: P1=3.8, P2=4.1, P3=4.4, P4=3.9, P5=3.35. Extracted from dataLayer serverSideEvents metric2.

review_count.notes: P1=1271, P2=2047, P3=4827, P4=28, P5=21. Extracted from dataLayer metric4.

key_features.notes: PREVIOUSLY LOW-SEVERITY ISSUE — NOW FIXED. All 5 products have populated key_features arrays with individual bullet-point strings. P1 has 8 features, P2 has 9 features, P3 has 5 features, P4 has 9 features, P5 has 7 features. The accordion heading selector using find(class_='ae-accordion__title') correctly matches <summary> elements.

specifications.notes: PREVIOUSLY LOW-SEVERITY ISSUE — NOW FIXED. All 5 products have populated specification dicts. P1 has 7 specs (Brand, Colors, Features, Length, Material, Toy Power Source, Width), P2 has 8 specs, P3 has 3 specs, P4 has 8 specs, P5 has 5 specs. All keys and values match expected structure from product_analysis.json.

color_variants.notes: P1=['Aqua'], P2=['Green'], P3=['Clear'], P4=['MultiColor'], P5=['Powder Blue']. All correctly extracted.

description.notes: All 5 products have descriptions from og:description. HTML entities properly included (e.g., & in output).

edge_case_results.notes: Products 1, 2, 3, 5 have sale/promo pricing with multi-price text (e.g., '$7.50 - $11.00'). The scraper correctly extracts only the first price and compares against the base price without crashing. Products 4 and 5 had was-price elements with marketing garbage appended — scraper now correctly extracts clean dollar amounts only. Product 3 (previously crashed) now extracts successfully with all fields populated.

script_checks.notes: All previous bugs fixed. No crashes. 5/5 products extracted successfully. Duration: 16.37s for 5 products (2s delay respected). Output JSON is valid and well-structured.
